testCoverage.notes: No coverage threshold is currently enforced by the project. Maintain existing behavior and add focused business-logic tests for touched areas.

formatting.notes: No project-wide formatter command is currently configured. Follow existing Svelte/TypeScript/Rust style and AGENTS.md conventions.

commitChecks: Run pnpm exec tsc --noEmit for frontend/type changes
Run pnpm test for frontend/business-logic changes
Run cargo test from src-tauri for Rust/backend changes
Run pnpm build:plugins plus targeted host/runtime tests for plugin platform changes
deployGates: Relevant plugin builds/tests pass when plugin platform code changed
No unreviewed changes to CI/release packaging

cicdIntegration.notes: Babysitter CI/CD integration was intentionally skipped during project install.
